problem id: 08df5363
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01001101 -> 00101001
  01010111 -> 01101010
  00101001 -> 00100101
  10100011 -> 01110100
  11110001 -> 00111110
  00010000 -> 00000010
  00000110 -> 11000000
  00000001 -> 00100000
  00101100 -> 10000101

query: 11100010
predicted answer: 01011100
